name: Flow of Forms
title: Wayward Hermetic Spiritspeaker: Flow of Forms
desc: "Night and day, in a place of exile far from worldly clamor, a hermit contemplates an ever-changing flow of forms and the metaphors they contain. Any warrior with the courage to step up and accept her challenge will face the colorful trials she has woven."
in_play_description: After you play Radiant Hues, create 2 stacks of Shield. (Once per Round)

attributes.source: Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge against the Wayward Hermetic Spiritspeaker at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives in a Friendly Fracas

skills.desc:
Fast Action: Equip this to your Wayward Hermetic Spiritspeaker.
Create 1 Radiant Hues and add it to your Hand.
After you play Radiant Hues, create 2 stacks of Shield. (Once per Round) (You must have Wayward Hermetic Spiritspeaker in your deck to add this card to your deck)
